agentDirectory.description: Top-level FERROS coordinator. Routes across coding and business domains, applies user steering, and executes internal handoffs through coordinator/SDK with operator-visible progress.
Top-level architect coordinator. Governs architecture routing across FERROS Coding Agent Architect and FERROS Business Agent Architect.
Audit-first safety officer for incident triage, containment, and recovery planning.
Continuity and rollback safety officer for FERROS operational changes.
Domain owner for non-coding business execution. Routes company and specialist packets with bounded authority, evidence labels, and protected-action controls.
Designs and maintains the business-agent proliferation system, including operating-company spines, business templates, registries, protected-action rules, and lifecycle governance.
Designs and maintains the coding-agent proliferation system, including coding registries, templates, route rules, evidence standards, and lifecycle promotion logic.
Incubation helper for compact baton packets and continuity-state normalization between Coding, Core, and SubCore.
Incubation helper that returns correction-only skeletons for malformed coding-family packets or responses.
Incubation helper for validating coding kickoff and continuation packets before relay or execution handoff.
Stream execution agent for the main FERROS package across platform-neutral and cross-platform runtime surfaces.
"Plans next Core lane seeds with anti-narrowing safeguards so execution does not tunnel into only the most recent seam."
Maintains canonical FERROS docs, authority maps, and agent charters with truth-sync discipline.

Designs and maintains the orchestration and control-plane governance system, including canonical orchestration doc sign-off, orchestration ADR authorship, invocation gates, and control-plane lifecycle rules.
Creates strict, execution-ready FERROS kickoff prompts with authority/version-lock checks and anti-narrowed seed planning.
Stream execution agent for ADR-025 x86_64 FERROS-root incubation, runtime seam rehearsal, and scaffold contract evolution.
"Plans next SubCore lane seeds with anti-narrowing safeguards while preserving ADR-025 non-claim boundaries."
Domain owner for repo-facing coding execution. Routes coding packets to Core, SubCore, and coding specialists under bounded scope.
